name: report_accelerator_utilization
short_description: Compute Accelerator utilization of device and display report
full_help:
report_accelerator_utilization

Description: 
Compute Accelerator utilization of device and display report

Syntax: 
report_accelerator_utilization  [-file <arg>] [-name <arg>] [-json]
                                [-kernels <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
Report

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-file]     Filename to output results to. (send output to console if -file
              is not used)
  [-name]     Output the results to GUI panel with this name
  [-json]     Generate a JSON view of the data in addition to the report
  [-kernels]  Report utilization of given list of kernels
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report
